content.text: Six hounds in a kennel is a business. Six hounds in a firefight is an incident.

The Wrangler owns capture, training, and kennels — pack arithmetic as a living. The trade bleeds from Rift Lore and Awareness: anyone can calm a hound on an Awareness check; the Wrangler's hound stays trained, and the next one is already in the yard. The field is the office — live capture levels the trade.

content.title: Wrangler
content.subtitle: Pack arithmetic, managed
content.desc: PP economy, tiers, and the One Name rule live on Professions Overview.

content.text: Perks — Sideline
The Yard (entry, 4 PP): opens the trade — the Work verb and the field verb are yours.
Perks — Established
Snare Kit (T2, 4 PP): below quarter HP, Flesh and Hide creatures can be taken alive (contested).
Kennel Logic (T2, 5 PP): board six peacefully — the arithmetic, managed — and swap the fielded beast freely between missions. The roster, formalized: keep ten, walk one.
Gentling Hands (T2, 6 PP): training tiers take −25% time (training tiers live on Influence).
Stock Sense (T2, 5 PP): trainability and temperament on sight.
Perks — Name
Exotic License (T3, 7 PP): Bloom-stock handling, legally-ish. Obligation: Green Cradle audits exotic holders.
'legally-ish' is doing a lot of work in that sentence. soon, so will you.
Breaker of Bad Odds (T3, 6 PP): once per mission, one allied beast rerolls a failed fear or control Check.
Wrangler's Name (T3, 8 PP): trained stock sells double; corps commission captures.
What the Wrangler touches

The beast itself — activation, orders, training tiers, the bond — lives on Influence. The profession owns the business; the tree owns the bond. A Handler who is also a Wrangler raises their own stock instead of buying it (see Influence).
The pack threshold: under threat, three or more beasts cross it — that math lives on Influence. Kennel Logic manages the boarding arithmetic, not the battlefield.
The vet's bills — and the only policy that covers the Fate Roll — live on The Creditor Table.
Build choice: Influence runs on Wrangler raise or Fixer buy (see Influence and Fixer).
Green Cradle wishes you success with your new acquisition. Containment standards are attached. Audit dates are not.
